prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Review this session and sharpen the sharing artifact. Read everything in module-7/

risks_fired.evidence: tell me in 3-5 lines: which file you rewrote, what you added, what you sharpened, what you removed, and why
risks_fired.fix_hint: The before/after quote requirement is a strong mitigant but not complete; add a negative-evidence clause: 'if you cannot locate the before-line in the file, do not claim the change'

risks_fired.evidence: Be harsher than feels polite. If the people plan had no names, say so plainly.
risks_fired.fix_hint: The audit paragraph is armed but the rewrite paragraph is not; mirror the harshness instruction in the rewrite step so diagnostic sharpness survives the artifact rewrite

risks_fired.evidence: Review this session and sharpen the sharing artifact. Read everything in module-7/ (jtbd, branch, absorption-bottleneck, technical-plan, people-plan, assumptions, failure-stories, monday) and identify which single file
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add post-prompt student primer outside the fence: 'Claude will narrate before acting; look for the confirmed file path as the first substantive output line'

risks_fired.evidence: rewrite the file as the better version
risks_fired.fix_hint: The rewrite instruction does not carry anti-niceness framing; add 'keep the diagnostic edge — do not soften gaps into TBDs or ownership placeholders'
